linchpin_standard.definition: CDR must be the coding-quality authority that people can inspect, trust, and emulate because it recursively hardens correctness, comprehensibility, debuggability, adaptability, security, observability, test evidence, integration proof, regression resistance, and improvement stop logic.

purpose: Make CDR self-recursive: CDR audits and improves CDR itself until no bounded high-value improvement remains.
stop_condition: Stop only when no open gap has benefit_score>=3, risk_score<=2, scope_cost<=2, and stage_fit=true; otherwise write next-stage handoff.
